title: DEX Pool Spot Price
body: Fetch real-time spot prices and liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.

title: ERC-20 Transfer History
body: Full paginated ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet and token contract pair.

title: Pump.fun Token Scanner
body: Monitor pump.fun's bonding curve program on Solana mainnet via GoldRush event logs — fetch the current market cap in USD, SOL held in the bonding curve, percentage progress toward graduation (~$69K), and the top 10 buyers ranked by SOL spent for any pump.fun token mint address. Subscribe to the graduation event stream to know the exact block when a token migrates to Raydium and acquires its first real liquidity pool — essential for launch-tracker UIs and autonomous sniper agents.

title: Solana Token Holders Snapshot
body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/token_holders/?page-size=100` to retrieve a ranked list of every wallet holding a given SPL token — returns wallet address, raw balance, USD value, and percentage of total supply for each holder. Paginate through all pages for a complete holder distribution. Use for airdrop snapshot lists, DAO governance voter registries, whale identification, or as input to a holder concentration risk score.

title: Solana Token Price History
body: Fetch OHLCV daily candlestick data for any SPL token via GoldRush's pricing endpoint — specify the mint address and date range (up to 365 days of history for tokens with sufficient liquidity). Each candle returns open, high, low, close price in USD, and 24h trading volume. Use to render price charts with Recharts or Chart.js, run strategy backtests, calculate unrealized P&L for agent-held positions, or power a token screener with momentum signals.

title: Solana Token Whale Alert
body: Subscribe to SPL token transfer events for any mint address via GoldRush's real-time activity stream on `solana-mainnet` — filter server-side for transfers above a configurable USD threshold (e.g. >$50K). Each alert payload includes: sender wallet, receiver wallet, token amount, USD value at time of transfer, and the tx signature for on-chain verification. Build a Telegram or Discord whale-alert bot that fires within seconds of a large transfer landing on-chain — under 100 lines of code.

title: SPL Token Metadata
body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/` with any SPL token mint address to retrieve: token name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo URI, and current USD price as indexed by GoldRush. Works for any SPL token including newly launched pump.fun tokens, wrapped assets, and DeFi governance tokens. This is the mandatory first call for any Solana token analytics page — gives your app complete token context from a single endpoint.

title: Spot Price Ticker
body: Live spot prices for thousands of tokens indexed by GoldRush across all chains.

title: Token Approval Scanner
body: Identify and audit all ERC-20 token approvals granted by any wallet address.

title: Token Holder List
body: Retrieve a ranked list of holders for any token contract address across chains.

title: Token Holders Leaderboard
body: Paginated leaderboard of every token holder with balance, percentage of supply, and rank — build airdrop lists, DAO voter registries, and holder dashboards.

title: Token Holders Snapshot
body: Paginated list of every holder of an ERC-20 token with balance, percentage of supply, and address. Essential for airdrops, governance snapshots, and holder analytics.

title: Token Metadata API
body: Fetch logos, decimals, contract info, and supply data for any ERC-20 token.

title: Token Price History
body: Historical USD price for one or more token contracts on any chain. Powers price charts, backtesting, P&L calculation, and DeFi analytics.

title: Token Search
body: Search any token by name or symbol across all indexed chains — returns address, chain, and logo for instant token lookup UIs.

title: Token Supply & Metadata
body: Fetch token contract metadata including name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo, and current USD price from a single endpoint.

title: Token Transfer Stream
body: Real-time stream of ERC-20 transfers for any token or wallet address.

title: Token Unlock Tracker
body: Monitor Transfer events from known vesting/lock contracts to track token unlocks as they happen — build an unlock calendar or alert system.

title: Token Whale Alert
body: Detect large ERC-20 transfers for any token in real-time — subscribe to wallet activity and fire alerts when a single transfer exceeds a USD threshold.
